archetype_description: A premium hybrid of 'Organic & Earthy' and 'Swiss & High-Contrast'. It uses warm bone/off-white backgrounds, deep navy primary text, and soft coral accents to create a trustworthy, high-end fintech interface reminiscent of Mercury or Stripe, but distinctively unique. Avoids all 'crypto-bro' neon aesthetics.

buttons.primary: bg-brand_accent text-white hover:bg-brand_accent_hover transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-primary_text text-white hover:bg-secondary_text transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-border text-primary_text hover:border-primary_text transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl px-6 py-3 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-secondary_text hover:text-primary_text hover:bg-surface_hover transition-colors duration-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.base: bg-surface rounded-2xl border border-border/50 shadow-card transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-hover overflow-hidden

inputs.base: w-full bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-primary_text focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary_text focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-tertiary_text

tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-secondary_text uppercase tracking-wider

banners.demo_disclaimer: bg-warning_light text-warning border-b border-warning/20 px-4 py-2 text-center text-sm font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2
banners.real_disclaimer: bg-brand_accent_light text-brand_accent border-b border-brand_accent/20 px-4 py-2 text-center text-sm font-medium flex items-center justify-center gap-2

simubot.panel: fixed bottom-6 right-6 w-[380px] bg-surface rounded-2xl shadow-dropdown border border-border overflow-hidden z-50 flex flex-col
simubot.header: bg-primary_text text-white p-4 flex justify-between items-center
simubot.message_user: bg-surface_hover text-primary_text rounded-2xl rounded-tr-sm p-3 max-w-[85%] self-end
simubot.message_bot: bg-brand_accent_light text-primary_text rounded-2xl rounded-tl-sm p-3 max-w-[85%] self-start border border-brand_accent/10

landing.layout: Clean, generous vertical rhythm. Large typography. Centralized hero section.
landing.hero: H1 text-5xl md:text-7xl with tight tracking. Prominent 'Start Demo Trading' primary button, alongside a secondary 'Connect Deriv' button.
landing.features: Bento grid layout for 'How it Works' using the Tetris grid pattern (asymmetry creates interest).

dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-4). Strict alignment, pure functionality.
dashboard.top_bar: Sticky nav. Shows total balance (mono font), Practice/Live toggle switch, Profile icon.
dashboard.content: Top row: 3 metric cards (Balance, P&L, Win Rate). Center: Volatility Watchlist Table (col-span-3). Right: Practice Account CTA card (col-span-1). Bottom: Recent positions table.

trading_terminal.layout: Full viewport height (h-screen), no page scroll. 3-column layout.
trading_terminal.left_sidebar: Sticky index selector (VIX, VXN, etc.). Clean list with tiny sparklines.
trading_terminal.center_chart: Recharts Area/Line chart taking up maximum space. Clean tooltips, no heavy gridlines.
trading_terminal.right_panel: Order entry. Long/Short toggle (pill shaped). Quick amount chips. Large execution button (green for Call/Long, red for Put/Short).
trading_terminal.post_trade: SimuBot rationale card slides in over the chart or right panel temporarily after execution.

real_mode.layout: Similar to Demo Terminal but with a persistent connection status bar.
real_mode.connection_modal: Clean, centered modal for Deriv API token entry. Secure masking for token input.
real_mode.portfolio: Deriv specific metrics syncing via WebSocket.

learn.layout: Magazine/Editorial style grid. Large imagery, serif or elegant sans-serif article titles.

animation_and_motion.hover: Use subtle transforms (translate-y-[-2px]) combined with shadow expansions.
animation_and_motion.data_updates: Flash background color subtly on tick updates (e.g., price change).
animation_and_motion.simubot: Spring animation for panel opening (stiffness: 260, damping: 20).

image_urls.description: Abstract light green gradient texture for ambient background blending
Minimalist business chart on desk for trading psychology articles
Top view of charts for technical analysis articles
White paper star geometric sign to be used for Simubot avatar fallback or abstract logo

testing.data_testid_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based strings (e.g., 'submit-trade-button', 'deriv-token-input').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Outfit (headings), Manrope (body), JetBrains Mono (numbers).
Configure Tailwind CSS to use the provided color variables in this JSON.
Do NOT use 'crypto-bro' neon colors. Stick strictly to the Cool Bone + Navy + Soft Coral palette provided.
Ensure the Demo Mode 'Simulation Platform Only' banner is rendered globally.
Implement the 'SimuBot' using the panel styling provided in this JSON.
Use Lucide React for all icons (minimal, clean).
Apply `rounded-2xl` to outer cards and `rounded-xl` to buttons and inputs.
Replace Shadcn default borders with the softer `#E5E5DF` border defined here.
Ensure all numbers, especially in the trading terminal and dashboard, use the mono font for tabular alignment.
Enforce `data-testid` on all buttons, links, inputs, and major state-displaying components.
